_comment: PROJECT-SPECIFIC TEMPLATE (COMMITTED) — copy needed values into config/project.local.json (gitignored) for real credentials and IDs.
username_comment: Login email/username for Palantir. Set via env var GLASS_LOGIN_USERNAME or here.
password_comment: Login password for Palantir. Set via env var GLASS_LOGIN_PASSWORD (recommended) or here. Keep empty if using env var.
login_id_comment: WWID or login ID for SSO selection. Set via env var GLASS_LOGIN_ID or here.
spreadsheet_id_comment: Google Sheet ID (same as orchestrator). Included here for UI config consistency.
email_account_comment: Gmail mailbox (same as orchestrator). Included here for UI config consistency.
email_password_comment: Gmail app password (same as orchestrator). Included here for UI config consistency.
sender_address_comment: Sender email (same as orchestrator). Included here for UI config consistency.
credentials_comment: SSO and credential configuration for Palantir login.
